headline: Rising intermodal volume slows big four U.S. rail systems
summary: Rising fuel and trucking costs have caused a rail volume surge, slowing down major U.S. railroads. The post Rising intermodal volume slows big four U.S. rail systems appeared first on FreightWaves.
